author: Matt F.
pros: Very advanced set of tools. Feature rich. SEO powerhouse. A.I. image creator and editor allows for quick turnaround times.
cons: So far I have no complaints. Looking forward to future additions.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I was dubious on AI - then I DID A THING!! 💯
description: Look, it's no secret I've been incredibly time poor at keeping my business promoted through the socials, and what has been even more difficult is finding the right 'assist' for the type of business I have (Holistic Health therapies) - but Brain Pod AI is hitting it perfectly.It's easy to navigate, easy to add additional tokens, INCREDIBLE support team, HEAPS of options and I've not even jumped into the blog copy mode nor the AI images yet!Seriously - I'm stoked, as a new user to the game that is simply looking for a way to remain active in my business socials - I recommend 100%. I'm even using the copy for workbooks!
author: Gemma H.
pros: Started with my first business post of a branding launch - hit the 'create content' and BAM - awesome!! 3 options with the click of the button. And although 2 of them weren't exactly perfect, they've saved for a later time and a different launch application (events!)! I've linked my pexel account to enable access to those images and create posts for social media. A few more questions and some screenshots to get clarity and BAM - I've got posts! Also LOVING the integration of Copyscape and too knowing that I can check my SEO words for suitability!
cons: I haven't come across anything that I'm not happy with to be honest. I had some difficulty to begin with using the Create Image, but that was resolved within the same day with awesome support.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Early days, lots of features... Could be great
author: Nick D.
pros: Does lots - this is good.Ability to easily include keywords etc to generate better quality content.I'll be using it and looking forward to see how they evolve the tools and the interface.The support response have been quick and good.
cons: Had to play around to get best results out, but I think this is the case with any AI writer. Occasionally it would write and article that stopped mid-sentence or got the topic wrong after the first sentence.The UX / UI is a bit 'Cave Quest' 1984 for my liking.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: BrainPod AI's Violet is a Game Changer!
description: So far so good. I've just created 2 long-form articles and did a batch of 5 articles with the bulk articles mode.
author: Ajaya J.
pros: What I like most about Violet by Brainpod.ai is the ability to create bulk articles from multiple keywords, and the SEO integration/analysis tool which is on par with Surfer SEO.
cons: What I least like is that the article outlines are lacking; the aren't that structured, and I have to re-order some of the headings.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Jean D.
pros: I tried several AI writers, besides just using Chat GPT ... Brain Pod AI is coming in on a different level. I was pleasantly surprised and I'm looking forward to the improvements they said they are going to roll out (e.g. the image maker) I started with the lowest tier but I'm quite sure I'll upgrade soon
cons: Image created needs more work, the token system is not favorable
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Julia K.
pros: I loved how it effortlessly generated high-quality content in a matter of seconds, covering a wide range of topics. The added bonuses of an AI Image Generator and an AI SEO Mode were just the cherry on top!Using this AI Writer powered by Violet, I was able to produce content 10x faster than usual, and at a fraction of the cost - this is definitely the full-service AI tool I have been looking for!I was also impressed with the Workflows feature that allowed me to get complete articles with just a few clicks. The API integration also made it easy to post content anywhere, which was a huge time-saver.
cons: I experienced only positive aspects and benefits of using the tool.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Content creating, image generating have been awesome
author: Sterling C.
pros: Love my Brain Pod AI Writer, I must say that I am thoroughly impressed with this tool. It has made the process of generating quality content a breeze. With just a few clicks, I can generate long-form content that is not only accurate but also well-written like no other.
cons: Have not found any issues with Brain Pod so far
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Stefano P.
pros: Started playing around with this tool after I've already other tools and really impressed by how well BrainPodAI is capable of generating long form content in less clicks than competitors and it seems the team is really receptive to feedback and they plan long term support. Really confident this can become one of the best tools in the space.
cons: Nothing bad to report so far. I haven't explored every single section of the tool yet but nothing to complain about so far.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: This tool is so great for blogging.
description: Incredible! Excellent! I love this AI writing tool.
author: Mark L.
pros: I love the quality of the articles and ease of use.
cons: The AI images should not have text, because AI images with text don't look right.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: So far, I've been able to accomplish what would usually take me weeks to do.
author: Tom C.
pros: I like that it's easy to use and the interface is simple to navigate.
cons: I didn't like their investor page. That's all I can think of, everything else is great.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Nicandro C.
pros: Desde que comecei a utilizar o Brain Pod AI Writer, percebi uma transformação significativa na maneira como produzo conteúdo. A facilidade de uso e a capacidade de adaptação às minhas necessidades específicas são impressionantes. A extensão para navegador é particularmente útil, permitindo que eu escreva e edite diretamente em várias plataformas online sem interrupções no meu fluxo de trabalho. Ele não é apenas uma ferramenta de escrita – é um parceiro indispensável na criação de conteúdo inteligente e otimizado. Recomendo fortemente a qualquer um que procure elevar a qualidade e eficiência da criação de textos.
cons: Precisa implementar o Português do Brasil
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: A utilização do Brain Pod AI pode oferecer uma vantagem competitiva às empresas, permitindo que elas tomem decisões mais assertivas, otimizem processos e melhorem a experiência do cliente
author: Marcelo T.
pros: Ferramenta poderosa para tomar decisões informadas e otimizar processos. É como ter um assistente de IA que processa informações de forma inteligente e personalizada para atender às necessidades específicas de cada negócio.
cons: Melhorar a facilidade de uso e tornar o treinamento de modelos mais acessível para usuários menos técnicos pode ser uma área de melhoria.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Speed and many apps in one along with the writer
author: ANSARI SHABNAM A.
pros: It generates long-form articles quickly for those who hate to wait. I use it for a scientific, niche topic. It covers the topic very well from the technical and SEO perspectives. This is cool because there isn't a ton of info on the internet for the AI engine to draw from. It validates the claimed efficacy of the native processing engine Violet. A bunch of apps to generate short-form content quickly is a bonus.
cons: The app would be even better with internal auto-linking, table of contents, takeaway snippets, etc in the long-form articles.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall, this has helped me to generate industry-specific articles that are engaging and SEO optimized
author: Natalya B.
pros: Love how you are walked through the flow of writing a blog in a few easy clicks- helps me to quickly and efficiently write interesting articles
cons: It isn't the most user-friendly of platforms with an overwhelming number of buttons and options that aren't always straightforward to use. It can also take a couple minutes to fully generate the articles
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The best AI Writer for entrepreneurs and SMEs
author: Kevin S.
pros: I really like using the feature to create blog articles in seconds and the SEO feature
cons: ometimes the software is a bit hard to understand because of the extension tools it has.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
